# CWE-783: Operator Precedence Logic Error (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-783-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

// Safe: explicit grouping ensures both authentication and ownership are required.
// Parentheses make the intended boolean logic obvious to future maintainers.
func EditDocument(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	authenticated := r.Header.Get("Authenticated") == "true"
	isAdmin := r.Header.Get("Is-Admin") == "true"
	ownerID, _ := strconv.Atoi(r.Header.Get("Owner-ID"))
	docOwner, _ := strconv.Atoi(r.Header.Get("Doc-Owner"))
	if !authenticated || !(isAdmin || ownerID == docOwner) {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
